name: Chimney Oaks Golf Club
about: Chimney Oaks Golf Club is a full-service hotel and resort located in Homer, GA, featuring an 18-hole championship golf course. The venue includes a state-of-the-art indoor training facility called The Forge, equipped with Trackman technology for virtual golf simulations, club fittings, and lessons. Accommodations consist of lodge-style rooms and suites with views of the greens, and the property offers amenities such as a fitness center, outdoor pool, and a sports bar. The facility is designed to cater to both casual golfers and serious players, with stay-and-play packages, annual memberships, and tournament options available.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a championship 18-hole course recognized as a top public course in Georgia
State-of-the-art indoor training facility with Trackman technology and course simulations
Comprehensive membership benefits including discounted lodging and merchandise
Professional golf instruction available for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant and grille (19th Hole) available on-site
Alcohol served at the sports bar and restaurant

simulator_hardware.notes: Two Trackman Bays with Face On and Down the Line cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but they also have rental clubs available for use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not allowed, but the venue has a full-service restaurant and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Players are required to complete 18 holes in 4 hours and 15 minutes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and offers activities suitable for juniors and youth.
